title: Cotton Candies
body:
# COTTON CANDIES
Adds 5 different colored Cotton Candies with special Effects to Minecraft!

**This includes**:
- Cotton Candy
- Pink Cotton Candy (Regeneration)
- Blue Cotton Candy (Speed)
- Green Cotton Candy (Jump Boost)
- Golden Cotton Candy (Similiar to Golden Apple)

### Language Supported:
- English
- Spanish
- German
- Russian
